description_long: This wallet features a rectangular, slightly tapered shape with a soft, fabric exterior adorned in a vibrant plaid pattern of blue, red, yellow, and orange. Both main faces display a stitched black and gold label, with one side showing a crown insignia and text. The wallet is bordered by a maroon trim, and a matching maroon fabric strap extends from one end, likely for carrying or attachment. The side views reveal the wallet's slim profile and the continuous plaid pattern wrapping around the edges. The overall construction suggests a soft, flexible body, likely with a fabric or textile shell and a possible inner lining for structure.
description: A soft, rectangular wallet with a colorful plaid fabric exterior, maroon trim, and a carrying strap. It features a stitched black and gold label with a crown insignia on both main faces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plaid pattern, maroon trim, and a black and gold label with a crown insignia; the maroon strap is visible on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim, tapered profile and the continuation of the plaid pattern; the maroon strap is seen extending from the top.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with the same plaid pattern, maroon trim, and black and gold label; the maroon strap is now on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and plaid pattern, with the maroon strap extending from the top.
attribute_brand_logo: A black and gold stitched label with a crown insignia and text, located centrally on both main faces of the wallet.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Plaid pattern in blue, red, yellow, and orange with intersecting lines forming squares and rectangles.
attribute_attachment_or_chain: A maroon fabric strap attached to one end of the wallet.
